ground_truth.title: Customer service software for the best customer experiences
ground_truth.main_content:
Zendesk for customer service
The complete customer service solution
Let Zendesk AI help you resolve requests from day one. Bring together customer conversations from all channels, giving agents the context they need. Access dashboards and data easily to enhance your service quality.
Use your work email to connect customer emails, apps, and invite team members.
Start your free trial
I agree to Zendesk contacting me with marketing-related communications.
By submitting, I agree to Zendesk's
Privacy Notice
.
Zendesk named a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for the CRM Customer Engagement Center
Read the report
Benefits
Quality service, made simple
Give your customers the responsive support they expect—through email, voice, messaging, or social media. Scale your team's capabilities with AI assistance that's always available, while our agent workspace helps agents efficiently manage and respond to every conversation.
Give agents a single workspace with complete customer views, predefined responses that save time, and seamless internal team collaboration—all without switching tools or losing context.
Grow your service operation efficiently. Questions automatically route to the right team member. Automate what makes sense, measure what matters, and keep costs manageable as you expand.
Gather important data points in one place and get a complete view of your business. Uncover operational improvements with prebuilt dashboards, or build your own in minutes. Spot coaching opportunities, identify agent knowledge gaps, and benchmark your service against peers.
Customer stories
“One of the biggest improvements is that Zendesk WFM can automatically generate schedules and forecasts based on our ticket volume. With the previous program, we had to put in more information and generate our own schedules.”
Jesse Barlow
Senior Team Lead, Customer Service, Conservice
Read customer story
“The reason that Zendesk is the right product is because it’s so user friendly. It’s been so easy to just basically set someone up for success from day one.”
Anastasia Parris
Marketing Operations Manager, Rain
Read customer story
“By consolidating everything into Zendesk, we’ve reduced our staffing costs by over 50% while increasing our efficiency, performance, and CSAT.”
Fabrice Dowling
Global Head of Customer Care, HeliosX
Read customer story
“Our successful experience with Zendesk AI has given artificial intelligence credibility across all of our business. For many of us, it’s the first AI tool that lived up to the hype and actually delivered.”
Raz Razaq
Head of Customer Contact Experience Technology, NEXT
